bio: Sara Geyer is a wellness leadership expert who delivers workshops, retreats, and speaking engagements designed to equip corporate leaders and teams with tools for sustainable, wellness-driven performance. She works with organizations seeking to reduce burnout and cultivate a thriving culture by integrating well-being into their leadership practices. Through her programs, Sara empowers leaders to lead with clarity, resilience, and a people-first mindset.
